rulings.Case Title: COMMONWEALTH LAND TITLE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. FEDEX OFFICE AND PRINT SERVICES, INC et al (PROVIDE ACCESS)

rulings.Case Title: CROWDFLOWER, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ASHER INSIGHTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Determination Of Prevailing Party And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 21, 2014, line 2. DEFENDANTs ASHER INSIGHTS, INC., MISSION STREET SF, LLC and 1517 HOLDINGS, LLC's Motion For Determination Of Prevailing Party And Request For Attorneys' Fees And Costs DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CROWDFLOWER, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. ASHER INSIGHTS, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 21, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF CROWDFLOWER, INC.'s MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES GRANTED. Plaintiff is the prevailing party. This action arose out of the dispute over the addendum. See Complaint filed on June 27, 2013. Plaintiff obtained an unqualified win on the addendum issue. Additional issues raised in the Second Amended Complaint filed on August 30, 2013 arose during the pendency of this litigation and were ancillary to the prime objective of preserving Plaintiff's rights under the lease. Plaintiff shall recover attorney's fees in the amount of $103,068.50 and costs in the amount of $3,144.45. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DARRIL HUDSON, TRUSTEE VS. AUDREY KORN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 21, 2014, line 4. PLAINTIFF DARRIL HUDSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELAINE TOY VS. EDWARD M. ZURAW JR. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 21, 2014, line 5. DEFENDANT EDWARD ZURAW's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges ultimate facts to assert a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Defendant cites no authority for the proposition that evidentiary showing of ownership must be included in the Notice or Complaint. Demurrer is not a proper motion to test the veracity of Plaintiff's allegations. = (501/REQ)
